title: Signup (Email + OTP)
description: New user registers with email and password, verifies via 6-digit OTP code, and gets a session. Includes invite auto-accept, cart merge, and recently-viewed merge as background side effects.

flows.title: Register & Verify Email
flows.trigger: User clicks Sign Up in navbar modal

steps.title: Open Sign Up Modal
steps.tooltip: User clicks Sign Up in navbar, modal opens with RegisterForm

steps.title: Enter Credentials
steps.tooltip: Email + password fields with client-side validation: email format, password min 8 chars

steps.title: Create User Account
steps.tooltip: Admin client creates user, bypassing email confirmation flow. Triggers Supabase to send OTP email.

steps.title: Show OTP Input
steps.tooltip: Form transitions to OTP input in same modal, no page change

steps.title: Verify OTP
steps.tooltip: verifyOtp(type='signup') — on success, Supabase sets session cookies

steps.title: Check Invite Token
steps.tooltip: Token was stored in Navbar state from ?register=true&invite={token}. Threaded to OtpInput via props.

steps.title: Auto-Accept Invite
steps.tooltip: acceptShopInvite(token) — only fires if invite token present. Failure never blocks. See shop-invite-acceptance.json.

steps.title: Merge Guest Cart
steps.tooltip: useCartMerge() merges localStorage cart to DB. Silent, no toast. See guest-cart.json.

steps.title: Merge Recently Viewed
steps.tooltip: useRecentlyViewedMerge() — POST /api/recently-viewed/merge. Deduplicates on server. Silent.

steps.title: Check Onboarding
steps.tooltip: Check onboarding_completed_at on member record. If null → banner appears. If set → user stays on current page.
